narrative:
Granville Township East (precinct in Mercer County) has 538 registered voters, with 43.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 49.6 percentage points.
